LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WEST BUILDERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT UNDERTOOK A DUTY TO INSPECT THE STAIRS FOR SAFETY ISSUES BUT NEGLIGENTLY FAILED TO DISCOVER AN UNSAFE CONDITION THAT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S INJURY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Marcia Pollioni, Esq. of Long Blumberg, LLP, 925-941-0090 for defendant and moving party West Builder, Inc.
Martin Murphy, Esq., 415-400-7000 for plaintiff and opposing party Daniel Boreen

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT WEST BUILDERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT UNDERTOOK A DUTY TO INSPECT THE STAIRS FOR SAFETY ISSUES BUT NEGLIGENTLY FAILED TO DISCOVER AN UNSAFE CONDITION THAT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S INJURY. Prevailing party to submit form of order that complies with CCP 437 c(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Candace Yount, CSR # 2737 (301/PJB)
